steps.title: Identify the sentence's function
steps.content: The strongest signal is that the sentence describes what happened when researchers studied artifacts—specifically, it reveals a finding or outcome from their research.

steps.title: Match to the correct choice
steps.content: To indicate one outcome of a study by Lucía Pérez-Ramos and her team names exactly this function: indicating the outcome of a study. The others either cite subjects absent from the sentence (flint tools, cities) or misrepresent the finding (as improvement rather than age). That matches the correct answer — C is correct.
